info.title: Jetonomy REST API
info.description:
Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 contract for the Jetonomy WordPress forum plugin (free core + Pro extensions). Built from the plugin's rest-api-reference.md, which was in turn generated by reading every register_rest_route() call in the source.

**Authentication.** Two modes, both funnelled through REST_Auth::auth_mutation(): (1) Cookie + `X-WP-Nonce` header (the web app) - every mutation needs a valid `wp_rest` nonce; get a fresh one from `GET /auth/nonce`. (2) Application Passwords via HTTP Basic (mobile app + integrations), which skip the nonce check. Both modes enforce ban/silence and pending-email-verification gates.

**Namespaces.** Almost everything is under `jetonomy/v1`. Two Pro surfaces live under `jetonomy-pro/v1` (marked with a per-operation `servers` override): the Attachments routes (`/attachments*`) and the Site Announcements admin routes (`/site-announcements*`). The public announcement read (`/announcements/active`) stays on `jetonomy/v1`.

**Private-community mode.** When Settings -> Community Access is `private`, every `GET` requires login; a logged-out read returns `401 community_private`.

**Pagination.** Offset-based (`limit`/`offset`) on most lists, cursor-based (`after`/`before`) on posts/replies/messages. Collection bodies are `{ data: [...], meta: { count, has_more, cursor_next, total, offset } }`.

servers.description: Jetonomy free core namespace (default for all routes unless a per-operation override says otherwise)

tags.name: Spaces
tags.description: Sub-communities: create, membership, roles, invites, join requests.

tags.name: Replies
tags.description: Threaded replies (up to 3 levels) under a post.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Login, registration, password reset, email verification, nonce.

tags.name: Search
tags.description: FULLTEXT search across posts, spaces, tags.

tags.name: Moderation
tags.description: Queue, flags, bans, and space-scoped moderation.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Image uploads and the community media library.

tags.name: App Config
tags.description: Mobile-app config and site admin utilities.

tags.name: Feed
tags.description: Global home feed, activity polling, oEmbed.

tags.name: Reactions
tags.description: Pro: emoji reactions on posts and replies.

tags.name: Custom Fields
tags.description: Pro: custom fields on posts, profiles, spaces.

tags.name: Web Push
tags.description: Pro: browser and native push notifications.

tags.name: AI
tags.description: Pro: AI usage stats and reply suggestions.

tags.name: Email Digest
tags.description: Pro: digest preferences and admin stats.

tags.name: Anonymous Posting
tags.description: Pro: reveal the author of an anonymous item.

get.description: List spaces the caller can see (visibility-filtered). Public read; in private-community mode requires login.

post.description: Create a sub-community. Requires manage_options OR jetonomy_create_spaces OR an opted-in WP role (Settings -> frontend_space_creation_roles).

get.description: Fetch a single space by ID. Public read (private-mode gated).

patch.description: Update space settings. Requires the caller to hold the per-space admin role or manage_options.

delete.description: Delete a space. Requires the per-space admin role or manage_options.

get.description: List members of a space (paginated).

post.description: Join the space (or create a join request when join_policy=request). Login required.

get.description: List the space's admins and moderators. Public read.
List pending join requests for the space. Requires space moderator.

post.description: Approve a pending join request. Requires space moderator.
Deny a pending join request. Requires space moderator.

patch.description: Change a member's per-space role. Requires space admin.

delete.description: Leave the space (self) or remove another member (space admin).

post.description: Generate a shareable invite link/token for the space. Requires space admin.

get.description: Resolve and accept a space invite token. Login required to join.
List posts in a space. Supports sort=latest|popular|oldest|newest|unanswered plus cursor (after/before) or offset pagination.

post.description: Create a post in a space. Requires jetonomy_create_posts and space membership per the space policy.

get.description: List the caller's own draft posts. Login required.
Fetch a single post, including its 1.8.0 attachments array. Public read (private-mode gated).

patch.description: Update a post or publish a draft. Requires author or moderator.

delete.description: Trash a post. Requires author or moderator.

post.description: Toggle whether a post accepts new replies. Requires author or moderator.
Pin/unpin a post within its space (capped per space). Requires space moderator.
Move a post to another space. Requires moderator.
Merge this post's replies into another post. Requires moderator.
Set the roadmap status of an idea post (Ideas spaces only). Requires space moderator.
Cast a vote on a post. Requires jetonomy_vote.

delete.summary: Remove my vote from a post
delete.description: Remove the caller's vote from a post.

get.description: Fetch Open Graph metadata for a URL (for composer link previews). Login required.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to fetch OG metadata for

get.description: List replies for a post (threaded up to 3 levels). Supports sort=oldest|newest|best.

post.description: Create a reply on a post (optionally nested via parent_id). Requires jetonomy_create_replies.

patch.description: Update a reply. Requires author or moderator. (No GET on this route.)

delete.description: Trash a reply. Requires author or moderator.

post.description: Mark a reply as the accepted answer (Q&A spaces only). Requires the post author or a moderator.

delete.description: Remove accepted-answer status from a reply.

post.summary: Split a reply into a new post
post.description: Split a reply out into a new post. Requires moderator.
Cast a vote on a reply. Requires jetonomy_vote.

delete.summary: Remove my vote from a reply
delete.description: Remove the caller's vote from a reply.

get.description: Fetch the authenticated caller's full profile. Login required.

patch.description: Update the caller's own profile. Login required.

delete.description: Delete the caller's own account (Apple 5.1.1(v) / GDPR Art. 17). Rate-limited 5/hour. Allowed even for unverified accounts. By default content is anonymized; pass delete_content=true to hard-delete.

get.description: Fetch a user's public profile by ID. Public read (private-mode gated).

get.summary: Get a public profile by username
get.description: Fetch a user's public profile by username. Public read (private-mode gated).
List a user's public posts. Public read (private-mode gated).
@mention typeahead suggestions. Login required.
List the members the caller has blocked. Login required.

post.description: Block another member. Login required.

delete.description: Unblock a member (idempotent). Login required.

post.description: Authenticate with username/email + password. Rate-limited 5/min per IP.
Create a new account (anti-spam gated). Rate-limited 5/min per IP.
Request a password reset email. Rate-limited 3/5min per IP.

get.description: Consume an email verification link.
Return a fresh wp_rest nonce for the current session. Login required.

post.description: Resend the email verification link. Rate-limited 3/5min per IP.

get.description: List the caller's notifications. Login required.
Return the caller's unread notification count (cached 15s). Login required.

post.description: Mark all of the caller's notifications as read. Login required.

patch.description: Mark a single notification as read. Scoped to the caller.

delete.description: Delete a single notification. Scoped to the caller.

post.description: Bulk mark-read or delete notifications. Login required.

get.description: List the caller's subscriptions; each row includes the target's title/slug/exists (1.8.0). Login required.

post.description: Subscribe to a space or post. Login required.

delete.description: Remove a subscription. Scoped to the caller.

get.description: MySQL FULLTEXT boolean-mode search. type=all returns {posts, spaces, tags} grouped; limit/offset apply to the posts group. Sets X-WP-Total/X-WP-TotalPages.
List categories (nested). Public read.

post.description: Create a category. Requires jetonomy_manage_categories.

get.description: Fetch a single category. Public read.

delete.description: Delete a category. Requires jetonomy_manage_categories.

get.description: List post tags (read-only; no write routes). Public read.
Reputation ranking. Public read.
List the caller's bookmarked posts. Login required.

post.description: Toggle a bookmark on a post. Login required.

delete.description: Remove a bookmark. Login required.

get.description: List the pending + spam queue. Requires jetonomy_moderate.

post.description: Approve a queued item. Requires jetonomy_moderate.
Mark an item as spam (applies a reputation penalty). Requires jetonomy_moderate.
Trash an item. Requires jetonomy_moderate.

get.description: List reported content. Requires jetonomy_moderate.

post.description: Report a post or reply. Login required.

get.description: List flags for the moderation dashboard. Requires jetonomy_moderate.

post.description: Resolve a flag; a valid flag trashes the content and rewards the reporter. Requires jetonomy_moderate.
Bulk approve/spam/trash queued items. Requires jetonomy_moderate.

get.description: List flags reported on a single post. Requires jetonomy_moderate.
List active bans/silences/space-bans. Requires jetonomy_moderate.

post.description: Issue a ban, silence, or space-ban. Requires jetonomy_moderate. Guards: cannot restrict self, a site admin, or (as a mere moderator) another moderator.

delete.description: Lift a restriction. Requires jetonomy_moderate.

get.description: List the space-scoped flag queue. Requires space moderator.

post.description: Resolve a space-scoped flag. Requires space moderator.
Approve, spam, or trash content within a space. Requires space moderator.
Upload an image (multipart). Requires upload_files OR jetonomy_upload_media OR jetonomy_create_posts OR jetonomy_create_replies.

get.description: List community media library uploads. Requires jetonomy_manage_settings.
Public branding + Pro feature flags for pre-login theming (mobile app). Public read.
Global cross-space home feed. Public read (private-mode gated).
Poll for activity since a timestamp. Public read (private-mode gated).
oEmbed 1.0 JSON for a forum thread URL (Slack/X/Discord unfurl). Public read.

post.description: Rebuild denormalized counters. Requires manage_options.
Bulk-set trust level for users. Requires manage_options.

get.description: List the caller's conversations. Login required.

post.description: Start a new conversation. Requires trust level >= 1 (admins/mods bypass); a direct message requires a shared space and no active block.

get.description: Fetch a conversation. Requires participant.

patch.description: Update conversation state (e.g. mute). Requires participant.

get.description: List messages in a conversation (cursor: before). Requires participant.

post.description: Send a message to a conversation. Requires participant and trust level >= 1.

get.description: Return the caller's unread conversation count (cached 30s). Login required.

post.description: Toggle mute on a conversation. Requires participant.
Toggle archive on a conversation. Requires participant.
Leave a group conversation. Requires participant.
Block the other side of a direct conversation. Requires participant.

get.description: Typeahead of eligible recipients (scoped to shared spaces). Login required.
Get reaction counts for a post. Public read (private-mode gated).

post.description: Toggle a reaction on a post (single-reaction-per-user; a different emoji swaps the prior one). Requires jetonomy_vote.

get.description: Get reaction counts for a reply. Public read (private-mode gated).

post.description: Toggle a reaction on a reply (single-reaction-per-user). Requires jetonomy_vote.

get.description: Get the poll attached to a post. Public read (private-mode gated).

post.description: Create a poll on a post (one poll per post; 409 on a second create). Requires post author or moderator.

patch.description: Close/reopen a poll. Requires poll creator or moderator.

post.summary: Cast or switch a poll vote
post.description: Cast or switch a vote. For multiple-choice, option_ids is the desired final set (idempotent reconcile). Requires jetonomy_vote.

delete.description: Remove the caller's poll vote.

get.description: List custom field definitions. Public read.

post.description: Create a custom field. Requires manage_options.

patch.description: Update a custom field. Requires manage_options.

delete.description: Deactivate a custom field. Requires manage_options.

get.description: Read a post's custom field values. Public read.

patch.description: Write a post's custom field values (raw {slug: value}; invalid values reported per-field in a 400 without blocking the rest). Requires author or moderator.

get.description: Read a user's profile custom field values. Public read.

patch.description: Write the caller's own profile custom field values. Login required.

get.description: List active badges (paginated). Public read.

post.description: Create a badge. Requires manage_options.

get.description: Get a badge (includes earned_count). Public read.

delete.description: Deactivate a badge. Requires manage_options.

get.description: List a user's earned badges. Public read.

post.description: Manually award a badge to a user. Requires manage_options.

delete.description: Revoke a manually-awarded badge. Requires manage_options.

get.description: List webhooks. Requires manage_options.

post.description: Create a webhook. Requires manage_options. Payloads are HMAC-signed (X-Jetonomy-Signature); auto-disabled after 5 consecutive failures.

delete.description: Delete a webhook. Requires manage_options.

post.description: Send a test delivery to the webhook URL. Requires manage_options.

get.description: Paginated delivery log (30-day retention). Requires manage_options.
Read white-label branding settings. Requires manage_options.

patch.description: Update white-label branding settings. Requires manage_options.

get.description: Public/app read of active pinned announcements. Public read. Served on the jetonomy/v1 namespace.
Admin: list pinned post IDs. Requires manage_options. Served on the jetonomy-pro/v1 namespace.

post.description: Admin: pin a post as an announcement (capped at 5). Requires manage_options. Served on jetonomy-pro/v1.

delete.description: Admin: unpin an announcement. Requires manage_options. Served on jetonomy-pro/v1.

get.description: Return the public VAPID key for browser push. Public read.
Return the push service worker script. Public read.

post.description: Register a browser PushSubscription. Login required.

delete.description: Remove a browser PushSubscription. Login required.

post.description: Register a native (Expo) push token. Login required.

delete.description: Remove a native push token. Login required.

get.description: AI usage statistics. Requires manage_options.
By-provider AI usage summary. Requires manage_options.

post.description: Suggest a reply draft for a post. Login required and the caller must be able to read the post.

get.description: List automated moderation rules. Requires manage_options.

post.description: Create an automated moderation rule. Requires manage_options.

patch.description: Update a moderation rule. Requires manage_options.

delete.description: Delete a moderation rule. Requires manage_options.

get.description: Trigger statistics for a moderation rule. Requires manage_options.
Read the caller's digest frequency + subscribed types. Login required.

patch.description: Update the caller's digest frequency + subscribed types. Login required.

post.description: Send a test digest to the caller. Requires manage_options.

get.description: Digest send statistics. Requires manage_options.
Read per-space meta title/description/OG image. Requires space admin.

patch.description: Update per-space meta title/description/OG image. Requires space admin.

post.description: Inbound email webhook (signature/token-verified, not a WP capability). Used by the mail provider to post replies.
Reveal the real author of an anonymous post/reply (audit-logged). Requires manage_options.
Link an uploaded WP media item to a post or reply. Requires the parent's write permission. Served on jetonomy-pro/v1.

delete.description: Detach an attachment link (id = link_id, not the WP media ID). Requires the parent's write permission. Served on jetonomy-pro/v1.

get.description: Force-download an attachment (Content-Disposition). Public read following the parent's visibility. Served on jetonomy-pro/v1.
Batch read attachments for an admin content-view page. Requires manage_options. Served on jetonomy-pro/v1.

cookieAuth.name: wordpress_logged_in
cookieAuth.description: WordPress logged-in session cookie (the web app).

nonceAuth.name: X-WP-Nonce
nonceAuth.description: wp_rest nonce, required on every mutation for cookie-authenticated requests. Refresh via GET /auth/nonce.

appPassword.description: WordPress Application Password sent as HTTP Basic auth (mobile app + external integrations). Skips the cookie-nonce check.

BadRequest.description: Bad request / validation error (invalid or missing parameters).

Unauthorized.description: Authentication required, or community is in private mode (401 community_private) for a logged-out read.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not permitted (e.g. jetonomy_forbidden, jetonomy_user_banned, jetonomy_pending_verification, rest_cookie_invalid_nonce).

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist.

Conflict.description: Conflict with current state (e.g. a poll already exists, or the announcement pin cap is reached).

RateLimited.description: Too many requests - IP rate limit exceeded (429 jetonomy_rate_limited).
